title: zanonia indica var. paludosa
intro: Zanonia indica var. paludosa, commonly known as the paludosa calabash, is a variety of the Zanonia indica plant, belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The paludosa calabash has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, due to its high content of antioxidants and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds, leaves, and roots are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
